content:
# Microfacies Analysis

**Summary**: The study of small-scale rock textures and their significance.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]] used microfacies analysis to interpret the depositional environment.

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] performed microfacies analysis to interpret paleoenvironmental conditions.

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] applied microfacies-analysis to define facies associations (FA1-FA5) for different depositional environments.

- [[2016-hassan-2|Hassan, 2016]] applied microfacies-analysis to identify 21 different lithofacies in the Dam Formation.

- [[2016-septriandi|Septriandi, 2016]] applied microfacies-analysis to characterize the sedimentary environment of the Dam Formation.

- [[2017-elyamani|ElYamani, 2017]] performed microfacies analysis to determine depositional environments.

- [[2017-adam|Adam, 2017]] used microfacies-analysis to characterize the lithofacies of the Khartam member.

- [[2018-ismanto|Ismanto, 2018]] performed microfacies analysis to identify distinct carbonate types and their associated environments.

- [[2021-alabyadh|Alabyadh, 2021]] performed microfacies-analysis to characterize the carbonate environment.

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] applied morphogroup analysis to DWAF to interpret trophic levels and environmental changes.

## Instruments and Software



- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] performed microfacies analysis to interpret paleoenvironmental conditions.

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] applied microfacies-analysis to define facies associations (FA1-FA5) for different depositional environments.

- [[2016-hassan-2|Hassan, 2016]] applied microfacies-analysis to identify 21 different lithofacies in the Dam Formation.

- [[2016-septriandi|Septriandi, 2016]] applied microfacies-analysis to characterize the sedimentary environment of the Dam Formation.

- [[2017-elyamani|ElYamani, 2017]] performed microfacies analysis to determine depositional environments.

- [[2017-adam|Adam, 2017]] used microfacies-analysis to characterize the lithofacies of the Khartam member.

- [[2018-ismanto|Ismanto, 2018]] performed microfacies analysis to identify distinct carbonate types and their associated environments.

- [[2021-alabyadh|Alabyadh, 2021]] performed microfacies-analysis to characterize the carbonate environment.

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] applied morphogroup analysis to DWAF to interpret trophic levels and environmental changes.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Identified a partially restricted continental shelf as the depositional setting. ([[1996-matter|Matter, 1996, p. 26]])

- A total of five distinctive microfacies were identified in the succession. ([[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992, p. 13]])

- Identified 12 lithofacies in the Wadi Waqb member, categorized into five distinct facies associations. ([[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015, p. 85]])

- Detailed lithofacies study resulted in 21 different lithofacies, including two sandstone lithofacies. ([[2016-hassan-2|Hassan, 2016, p. 158]])

- Identified a restricted carbonate platform in a very shallow marine or hypersaline lagoonal environment. ([[2016-septriandi|Septriandi, 2016, p. 108]])

- Identified several distinct microfacies such as rudstone and wackestone. ([[2017-elyamani|ElYamani, 2017, p. 67]])

- Identified oolitic, peloidal, and bioclastic lithofacies within the Khartam member. ([[2017-adam|Adam, 2017, p. 64]])

- Identified 8 distinct microfacies including peloidal skeletal wackestone and burrowed wackestone. ([[2018-ismanto|Ismanto, 2018, p. 17]])

- Defined 10 distinct microfacies (MF1-MF10) in the studied section. ([[2021-alabyadh|Alabyadh, 2021, p. 83]])

- M4 morphogroup showed a recovery to pre-Paleocene values, indicating stable organic carbon flux. ([[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024, p. 111]])
